definitions: 启迪；觉悟；开悟；（尤指精神或思想上的）领悟

examples.text: finally vowing to mend his ways. So when the Bodhisattva Guanyin happened by his prison on a sacred journey, he promised to pursue enlightenment if she would end his torment. The goddess of compassion was skeptical of Sun Wukong's change of heart, but decided to give him an opportunity to prove himself.
examples.explanation: 这里的 enlightenment 指精神上的“觉悟、开悟”，尤其是在宗教或修行语境中追求更高层次的理解与解脱。句中 Sun Wukong 承诺如果观音结束他的痛苦，他就会追求 enlightenment。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
